insights.executiveSummary: The device completed a 34.2 km journey across three reporting windows. Engine use was continuous, with a short idle period and one recorded stop. A brief high-speed interval merits routine review.

insights.title: Consistent utilisation
insights.detail: The engine remained active throughout the 45-minute period.

insights.title: Idle time concentration
insights.detail: Most idle time occurred in the middle reporting window.

anomalies.title: Elevated peak speed
anomalies.detail: A maximum speed of 92.1 km/h was recorded in the final window.

anomalies.title: Extended idle period
anomalies.detail: Seven idle minutes were recorded between 08:15 and 08:30 UTC.

recommendations: Review the final-window route and confirm the elevated speed aligns with fleet policy.
Investigate the middle-window idle period if it is not operationally required.

notableWindows.summary: The device recorded its only stop and the greatest idle duration.
The fastest interval also produced the highest distance travelled.
